testsuite.system-out: 08:31:13.236 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 08:31:13.236 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Self-refutation: bumped incarnation to 1 08:31:13.237 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 08:31:13.239 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 08:31:13.241 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 08:31:13.242 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 08:31:13.242 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 restored to ALIVE via indirect ping 08:31:13.243 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 08:31:13.244 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 08:31:13.246 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 08:31:13.246 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-2 declared DEAD (suspect timeout expired) 08:31:13.246 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-3 marked SUSPECT (direct ping failed) 08:31:13.246 [Test worker] INFO turbomq.broker.GossipProtocol -- Node Node-3 declared DEAD (suspect timeout expired)
